summary: Historical Replay Mode for Simulation Comparison Engine - All 13 backend tests and 15+ frontend UI tests PASSED. Replay mode allows operators to query historical anomaly data using start_time and end_time parameters. Mode selector, replay presets, custom date picker, and replay metadata panel all working correctly.

backend.test_replay_mode_successful_with_histori: PASS - March 1-4 date range returned data

frontend.mode_selector_renders: PASS - Live Telemetry and Historical Replay buttons present
frontend.run_replay_button_text: PASS - Button says 'Run Replay' in replay mode
frontend.replay_sends_correct_payload: PASS - API receives mode=replay with start/end times
frontend.replay_metadata_panel_displays: PASS - Shows window, events, anomaly records, devices
frontend.switching_modes_marks_stale: PASS - Stale banner appears when mode changes after run
frontend.live_mode_backward_compatible: PASS - Run Comparison in live mode works
frontend.stale_indicator_works: PASS - Amber banner with Re-run button
frontend.existing_features_work: PASS - Config cards, presets, validation, swap, apply all working

critical_code_review_comments: Backend validates replay mode correctly: missing start/end returns 422, end before start returns 422, >7 days returns 422, future end_time returns 422
replay_metadata contains all required fields: mode, start_time, end_time, window_span_minutes, telemetry_events_analyzed, anomaly_records_evaluated
Live mode remains backward compatible - default mode is 'live' when not specified
Frontend mode selector correctly toggles between Live Telemetry and Historical Replay
Replay presets dropdown includes all requested options: 15min, 1h, 6h, 24h, 3d, 7d, Custom
Custom date range picker shows datetime-local inputs for start/end times
ReplayMetadataPanel component displays historical replay metrics correctly
Stale indicator correctly tracks mode changes after a successful run
seed_data_creation: None needed - used existing historical data from March 1-4, 2026
context_for_next_testing_agent: Historical Replay Mode fully tested and working. Backend endpoint POST /api/operator/simulate/compare/multi-metric accepts mode='replay' with start_time and end_time (ISO format). Frontend Compare tab has mode selector at top with Live Telemetry (default) and Historical Replay buttons. Replay mode shows presets dropdown (15min to 7 days + Custom) and custom date pickers. Response includes replay_metadata with window_span_minutes, telemetry_events_analyzed, anomaly_records_evaluated. Stale indicator appears when switching modes after a successful run.
